proposed_tables.name: cg_raw.kpione_raw_ingest_batch_v1
proposed_tables.purpose: Registry and rollback tombstone for one explicitly approved candidate ingest batch

proposed_tables.name: cg_raw.kpione_raw_ingest_batch_file_v1
proposed_tables.purpose: Per-file identity, evidence and role registry for one batch
proposed_tables.grain: one row per batch_id and source_file_id

proposed_tables.name: cg_raw.kpione_raw_event_photo_staging_v1
proposed_tables.purpose: Normalized raw event-photo rows after exact dedupe
proposed_tables.grain: one event-photo row per batch_id and photo_row_hash

proposed_constraints: primary key (batch_id) on batch registry
status is STAGED or ROLLED_BACK with coherent rolled_back_at and rolled_back_by tombstone fields
no rigid verdict taxonomy check; verdict remains required evidence text
primary key (batch_id, source_file_id) on batch file registry
foreign key batch_file.batch_id references batch registry with ON DELETE RESTRICT
foreign key staging.(batch_id, source_file_id) references batch_file with ON DELETE RESTRICT
unique (batch_id, photo_row_hash)
unique (batch_id, source_file_id, source_row_number)
not null: event_id, fecha, source_file_id, photo_row_hash and file identity fields
hash fields are lowercase 64-character hexadecimal
source_row_number >= 2
week_start equals Monday start of fecha
cod_rt or local_nombre must be nonblank
photo_sequence and photo_total may be null; when both parse, photo_sequence <= photo_total
photo totals such as 0/0 are retained for validation reporting instead of rejected
batch-file role is include_candidate, quarantine_truncation, compare_only or rejected_schema
batch-file row_count >= 0 and fecha_min <= fecha_max when both dates exist
staged_rows + exact_duplicates_removed = source_rows_total
coverage_start <= coverage_end
fecha inside batch coverage range is a future transactional assertion because PostgreSQL CHECK cannot reference the registry row
proposed_indexes: batch_file primary key (batch_id, source_file_id) supplies its composite index

grain_definition.staging: one normalized raw event-photo row after exact dedupe, scoped by batch_id
grain_definition.batch_registry: one lifecycle registry row per explicit batch_id; identity and evidence stay fixed while status may tombstone the batch
grain_definition.batch_file: one source-file evidence row per batch_id and source_file_id

dedupe_contract.hash_equivalence: photo_row_hash includes event_id in its normalized input, so the operational unique preserves the dry-run event_id + photo_row_hash identity inside a batch
dedupe_contract.same_photo_row_hash_within_batch: exact duplicate; keep one before insert and enforce unique(batch_id, photo_row_hash)
dedupe_contract.same_event_id_different_hash: blocking conflict detected by the companion validation query pack, not by a declarative constraint
dedupe_contract.cross_batch_rule: no implicit overwrite and no latest-batch-wins precedence

batch_contract.identity: explicit batch_id; source_file_id is artifact identity, not batch identity
atomic_future_sequence: verify candidate manifest SHA and source SHAs
register every file with its explicit role
insert registry, batch-file and staging rows in one short transaction
run the companion validation query pack
commit only under future explicit authorization
batch_contract.rollback_protocol: retain child evidence and transition the batch registry from STAGED to ROLLED_BACK with rolled_back_at and rolled_back_by; downstream activation must exclude tombstoned batches

patched_findings: lossless raw photo-number contract replaces n_fotos integer
rollback becomes an explicit STAGED/ROLLED_BACK tombstone lifecycle
batch-file child table owns file name, SHA, role and file-level counts
staging uses a composite foreign key to batch-file identity
active month and candidate manifest are protected by partial unique indexes
dedupe key and operational uniqueness are explicitly aligned
cross-table and event-conflict checks move to a companion validation query pack

risks.control: manifest and critical-column gate before batch creation
store raw link but validate reachability separately from event identity
scope uniqueness by batch and retain event/photo hashes

risks.risk: cod_rt missing and local_nombre fallback ambiguity
risks.control: require at least one location key and keep fallback in derived validation
review index cost and partitioning only when measured volume justifies it
no implicit latest-wins; define cross-batch activation separately
staging stores raw normalized facts only; compliance remains downstream

warnings: validation queries are proposals and have not been executed
manifest/daily total reconciliation remains a documented future placeholder
cross-batch activation and precedence remain undefined
SQL proposal has not been executed or applied
